pageContext.name: Modern Times
pageContext.description: To complement the 1:6 scale collectible figure of Charlie Chaplin, Star Ace is also releasing costume sets to recreate many iconic moments from his films.  This set is from the classic film Modern Times and comes with a set of worker's overalls, a t-shirt, and a set of wrenches.  Don't miss your chance to add this accessory set to your collection today!
